title: Infosys collaborates with Sentara to scale enterprise AI adoption in healthcare services
detailed_summary: Infosys announced a strategic collaboration with Sentara, a not-for-profit healthcare organization, to create a scalable foundation for AI-driven transformation across healthcare operations. Infosys will leverage Infosys Topaz Fabric, its purpose-built agentic services suite, to support AI strategy, road-mapping, reference architectures, AI-first SDLC modernization, governance, and scaling. The collaboration is intended to embed AI across core hospital and enterprise workflows, with stated focus areas including care management, employee productivity, digital front-office experiences, IT, hospital operations, and clinical support. No deal value, duration, revenue impact, or financial guidance was disclosed.
